name: @yksanjo/conductor
description: Situational awareness across a fleet of semi-autonomous workers. Pluggable adapters (Claude Code windows, trading bots, …) on one zero-dependency engine; read-only observation, opt-in control with an irreversibility gate.

scripts.test: node test.js && node policy.test.js && node fleet.test.js && node adapters/mev-searcher.test.js && node adapters/validator-fleet.test.js && node mcp.test.js && node manage.test.js && node server.test.js && node server.fleet.test.js
